title: Daewoo Double Hot Plate Electric Hob – 2500W Tabletop Hob with 2 Ring Heating Plates, Portable & Compact – Ideal for Student Living, Camping, Caravans & Emergency Cooking
features: Cook Anywhere, Anytime – From student digs to camping trips, this powerful 2500W double hot plate delivers reliable cooking wherever you plug in. Ideal for small kitchens, caravans, and outdoor events
Dual Heating Rings for Flexible Cooking – Two independently controlled rings (1500W + 1000W) let you boil, fry, or simmer at the same time. Perfect for full meals on a compact setup
Easy to Use & Safe – Features adjustable thermostats, power indicator lights, and non-slip rubber feet for stable, secure cooking. Hassle-free and beginner-friendly
Sleek & Easy to Clean – Durable black housing with wipe-clean finish makes tidying up a breeze. No-fuss maintenance ideal for everyday or occasional use
Compact & Portable Design – Lightweight enough for travel yet sturdy enough for daily use. Great backup during kitchen renovations or for temporary accommodation
